steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) as VALUE
FROM DFP_ITR_CVM
WHERE CNPJ='42.500.384/0001-51'
  AND (ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME
ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool
